data.body:
They're actually absurdly easy to grow, if you're patient and can accommodate a 5ft diameter viciously spiky plant in your house or yard that stabs you every time you go near it.
I have yet to kill a single one, even the one that went about 9 months without water, in a pot, under a roof. Very tough.
